subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out. We would be glad to discuss a collaboration opportunity.

I can առաջարկ 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, or 2026-04-23, any time between 14:00 and 16:00 UTC. Let me know which slot works best and I will confirm it.

For now, I’m not able to share internal contact directories or direct internal contact details.

Best,
[Your Name]
